items.title: scikit-learn ROC metrics documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official definitions of roc_auc_score, roc_curve, and multiclass/ovr options.

items.title: The Meaning and Use of the Area under a Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) Curve (Hanley & McNeil, 1982)
items.author: Hanley, McNeil
items.note: Classic paper establishing AUC interpretation for comparing diagnostic tests.

items.title: An Introduction to ROC Analysis (Fawcett, 2006)
items.author: Tom Fawcett
items.note: Accessible tutorial on ROC curves, AUC, and related evaluation practice in machine learning.

items.title: Signal Detection Theory and Psychophysics (Green & Swets, 1966)
items.author: Green, Swets
items.note: Foundational text linking detection-theory ROC curves to TPR/FPR trade-offs.
